summary: Classified five open PRs from the live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive signal was detected, and the job disables merge, fix PRs, low-signal closeout, and instant close. Draft/proof-blocked PRs are kept open; ready focused PRs require maintainer technical review rather than automated close/merge.
